title: *Contract Project Management Specialist (PMO Support)* #HHLT
description:
*Contract Project Management Specialist (PMO Support)*

📍 Location: Tuas

🕒 Duration: 6-Month Contract

💼 Working Hours: 5 days, office hours

💰 Salary: Up to $6,500 + $250 transport allowance

🚐 Transport Pick-Up Points

Jurong East | Boon Lay | CCK | Woodlands | Tampines | Sengkang | Bishan | Paya Lebar | Yishun


🔧 Key Responsibilities

A. Project Governance Setup & Maintenance

Establish and maintain governance structures for BEx and site-level projects

Develop and manage project templates, trackers, schedules, and reports

Ensure standardization and consistency across PM processes

B. Portfolio Oversight & Tracking

Track progress of:

Site Master Plan critical projects

Lean & Six Sigma (Improve stage) projects

One Plan initiatives

Monitor milestones, timelines, risks, and actions

Escalate delays and issues via governance channels

C. Reporting & Communication

Prepare weekly and monthly progress reports

Consolidate workstream updates into structured summaries

Support leadership reviews, tier meetings, and project discussions

D. Coordination & Follow-Up

Liaise with cross-functional teams for project updates

Follow up on actions, decisions, and deliverables

Support meeting logistics (scheduling, agenda, minutes)

E. Documentation & Compliance

Maintain up-to-date project documentation (plans, charters, trackers, minutes)

Ensure audit-ready documentation aligned with site and BEx standards

🎓 Qualifications

Minimum Diploma or Degree in Operations, Business, Engineering, or equivalent experience

Solid understanding of PM fundamentals and PMO workflows

Experience in Lean / Six Sigma projects (preferred but not mandatory)

Strong coordination, communication, and follow-up skills

Comfortable with spreadsheets, trackers, and structured reporting tools


If interested, please email me at biopharma@recruitexpress.com.sg or telegram @alexgohhl

➖

Alex Goh Hock Leong

(CEI.No: R1763413 l Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Life Science) | 99C4599)

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
